name: Performapal Trump Girl
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>トランプ・ガール
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
undefined

[ Monster Effect ] 
Once per turn: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control as Fusion Materials, including this card. If this card in the Pendulum Zone is destroyed: You can target 1 Dragon-Type Fusion Monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it, but destroy it during the End Phase.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control as Fusion Materials, including this card. If this card in the Pendulum Zone is destroyed: You can target 1 Dragon-Type Fusion Monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it, but destroy it during the End Phase.
eff: Once per turn: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control as Fusion Materials, including this card. If this card in the Pendulum Zone is destroyed: You can target 1 Dragon-Type Fusion Monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it, but destroy it during the End Phase.

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses itself as a Fusion Material
